synthesis_text: Simple ways to lower your risk of COVID‑19 include wearing a face mask in public or shared spaces [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00094]; washing hands frequently with soap and water and avoiding touching your face with unwashed hands [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00006]; keeping a physical distance from others, especially those who may be infected [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00006]; staying home except for essential medical care and calling ahead before visits [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00094]; covering coughs and sneezes with a tissue or elbow [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00094]; not sharing personal household items such as utensils or towels [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00094]; improving indoor ventilation by opening windows or using air filtration [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00006]; practicing good personal hygiene and maintaining a healthy diet [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00133]; keeping up to date with COVID‑19 vaccination [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00019]; and quarantining for at least 10 days if exposed or symptomatic [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00129].

Simple ways to lower your risk of catching COVID‑19 include keeping indoor spaces well‑ventilated [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00001], maintaining physical distance from others [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00001], wearing a mask in settings where transmission risk is high [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00001], washing hands with soap for at least 20 seconds [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00023] or using an alcohol‑based hand sanitizer (≥60% alcohol) when soap isn’t available [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00023], covering coughs and sneezes with a tissue or your elbow and then washing hands [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00023], avoiding close contact with anyone who is sick or showing symptoms [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00023], staying home if you feel ill or test positive for COVID‑19 [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00022], and staying up to date with COVID‑19 vaccination to reduce infection risk [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00001].

Simple ways to lower your risk of COVID‑19 are: wear a mask in public places and when sharing a room or vehicle with others [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00016]; keep at least 1 metre (about 3 feet) distance from other people in public [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00016]; avoid crowded, confined, or poorly ventilated indoor spaces [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00016]; wash hands frequently with soap and water or use an alcohol‑based hand rub [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00016]; keep indoor spaces well ventilated by opening windows or using fans [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00016]; get vaccinated against COVID‑19 to reduce infection risk and severity [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00012]; continue physical distancing, mask wearing, and hand hygiene even after vaccination [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00012]; and seek care early and stay home if you develop symptoms to avoid exposing others [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00021].
